series_metadata.series_description: File contains 5754 IRS tax forms identifying those persons that split prize winnings for prizes of $600.00 to $5,000.00. The form indicates the Claim Number of the individual that collected the prize winnings. The form includes each person's name, address, city, state, zip code, social security number and amount of winnings for all persons that shared in the prize. The 5754 file is arranged in Claim Number order by calendar year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year; then scan to digital copy. Destroy hard copy after the Auditor of State issues audit report ; Electronic: Retain the digital copy in system for four (4) years; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
